warmup.activity: Say 'Hello, my name is...' 5 times, faster each time

speakingPrompt: Introduce yourself to a new colleague. Include your name, where you're from, and what you do.
fluencyDrill: Repeat your introduction 3 times without pausing

warmup.activity: Tongue twister: She sells seashells by the seashore

speakingPrompt: Describe your complete morning routine from waking up to leaving home.
fluencyDrill: Describe your routine using only sequence words: first, then, next, after that, finally

warmup.activity: Practice room names: kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, living room

sentences: I love my cozy living room.
speakingPrompt: Give a virtual tour of your home. Describe each room and what you do there.
fluencyDrill: Describe one room in 30 seconds without stopping

warmup.activity: Practice: sunny, cloudy, rainy, windy, snowy

speakingPrompt: Describe the weather today and compare it with yesterday. How does weather affect your mood?
fluencyDrill: Give a 1-minute weather forecast for the week

warmup.activity: Practice family words: mother, father, brother, sister, grandmother

speakingPrompt: Describe your family. Talk about at least 3 family members and your relationship with them.
fluencyDrill: Introduce each family member in one breath per person

warmup.activity: Food texture words: crispy, creamy, crunchy, smooth, tender

speakingPrompt: Describe your favorite food in detail - the taste, texture, smell, and memories associated with it.
fluencyDrill: Explain how to make a simple dish in 2 minutes

warmup.activity: Future tense practice: I will, I'm going to, I plan to

sentences: This weekend I'm going to relax.
I plan to visit my friends.
speakingPrompt: Share your plans for this weekend. Include activities, people you'll meet, and places you'll go.
fluencyDrill: Plan an ideal weekend in 90 seconds

warmup.activity: Personality adjectives: kind, funny, honest, loyal, supportive

sentences: My best friend is very loyal.
We've known each other for years.
speakingPrompt: Describe your best friend - their personality, how you met, and what makes your friendship special.
fluencyDrill: Tell a funny story about you and your friend

warmup.activity: Polite phrases: Could I have, May I order, Would you recommend

sentences: Could I see the menu, please?
speakingPrompt: Role-play ordering a complete meal at a restaurant. Ask questions about the menu.
fluencyDrill: Order a 3-course meal with special requests in under 1 minute

warmup.activity: Direction words: turn left, turn right, go straight, next to, across from

speakingPrompt: Give detailed directions from your home to a nearby landmark or shop.
fluencyDrill: Give directions to 3 different places without hesitation

warmup.activity: Transport words: bus, train, car, bicycle, walking, traffic

sentences: Traffic is heavy during rush hour.
speakingPrompt: Describe your daily commute in detail - the route, what you see, and how you feel about it.
fluencyDrill: Narrate your commute as if it's happening right now

warmup.activity: Literary terms: plot, character, climax, theme, author

sentences: I would recommend this book because...
speakingPrompt: Summarize a book you've read and explain why you liked or disliked it.
fluencyDrill: Pitch a book to someone in 60 seconds to convince them to read it

warmup.activity: Travel words: explore, adventure, relaxation, sightseeing, culture

sentences: My dream vacation is in Japan.
I want to explore the temples.
speakingPrompt: Describe your dream vacation - where, why, what activities, and who would you take?
fluencyDrill: Plan a 7-day itinerary in 2 minutes

warmup.activity: Cooking verbs: chop, stir, bake, fry, boil, simmer

sentences: Then, heat the oil in a pan.
speakingPrompt: Explain step-by-step how to make your favorite dish.
fluencyDrill: Describe the cooking process using only present tense

warmup.activity: Past tense practice: celebrated, received, surprised, enjoyed

sentences: On my birthday, we celebrated at home.
speakingPrompt: Describe your most memorable birthday - what happened and why it was special.
fluencyDrill: Tell the birthday story in chronological order without backtracking

warmup.activity: Hobby verbs: play, collect, create, practice, learn

sentences: In my free time, I enjoy reading.
I've been doing this for years.
It helps me relax and unwind.
speakingPrompt: Talk about your hobbies - what they are, when you started, and why you enjoy them.
fluencyDrill: Convince someone to try your hobby in 90 seconds

warmup.activity: Job qualities: challenging, rewarding, creative, stable, flexible

sentences: I want a role that offers...
Career growth is important to me.
speakingPrompt: Describe your ideal job - responsibilities, work environment, and why it appeals to you.
fluencyDrill: Explain why you'd be perfect for your ideal job

warmup.activity: Film genres: comedy, drama, thriller, action, documentary

speakingPrompt: Review a movie you recently watched - plot, acting, and your opinion.
fluencyDrill: Summarize the movie plot in exactly 60 seconds

warmup.activity: Place adjectives: historic, modern, bustling, peaceful, vibrant

sentences: I live in a bustling city.
The best thing about my city is...
speakingPrompt: Give a comprehensive description of your city - landmarks, culture, pros and cons.
fluencyDrill: Be a tour guide for your city for 2 minutes

warmup.activity: Celebration words: tradition, ceremony, ritual, feast, decoration

sentences: We celebrate this festival every year.
speakingPrompt: Explain a cultural celebration from your country - when, how, and its significance.
fluencyDrill: Explain the celebration as if to a foreign visitor

warmup.activity: Exercise words: cardio, stretching, weights, reps, sets

sentences: I exercise three times a week.
My routine includes cardio and weights.
Staying fit is important to me.
speakingPrompt: Describe your exercise routine or the routine you'd like to have.
fluencyDrill: Lead a 2-minute guided workout using clear instructions

warmup.activity: Tech words: smartphone, laptop, app, software, internet

speakingPrompt: Discuss the technology you use daily - devices, apps, and how they help you.
fluencyDrill: Explain how to use an app to someone who's never used a smartphone

warmup.activity: Challenge words: obstacle, overcome, persevere, struggle, achieve

sentences: I faced a difficult challenge when...
I learned that perseverance pays off.
speakingPrompt: Share a challenge you've overcome - what happened, how you dealt with it, and what you learned.
fluencyDrill: Tell the story with emotional expressions and pauses for effect

warmup.activity: Office words: desk, monitor, chair, organized, cluttered

sentences: A clean desk helps me focus.
speakingPrompt: Give a detailed tour of your workspace - setup, organization, and favorite items.
fluencyDrill: Describe your ideal workspace in one continuous 90-second speech

warmup.activity: Music words: rhythm, melody, lyrics, beat, genre

sentences: I listen to music while working.
speakingPrompt: Talk about your music preferences - genres, favorite artists, and how music affects you.
fluencyDrill: Describe your favorite song and why you love it

warmup.activity: Learning words: visual, auditory, kinesthetic, practice, memorize

speakingPrompt: Describe how you learn best - techniques, environments, and what helps you retain information.
fluencyDrill: Teach someone a simple concept using your preferred learning style

warmup.activity: Emotion words: embarrassed, awkward, surprised, relieved, humiliated

sentences: I remember feeling so embarrassed when...
I learned to laugh at myself.
speakingPrompt: Share an embarrassing moment - what happened, how you felt, and how you handled it.
fluencyDrill: Tell the story with humor and self-deprecation

warmup.activity: Pet words: loyal, playful, affectionate, trained, companion

sentences: Taking care of pets teaches responsibility.
speakingPrompt: Describe your pet or a pet you'd like to have - personality, care, and your bond.
fluencyDrill: Introduce your pet as if they were a person with a personality

warmup.activity: Sports words: score, team, competition, victory, training

sentences: I enjoy watching the World Cup.
speakingPrompt: Talk about a sport you enjoy - rules, why you like it, and memorable moments.
fluencyDrill: Commentate an imaginary play-by-play for 60 seconds

warmup.activity: Teaching words: inspire, motivate, encourage, mentor, guide

sentences: They believed in me when I didn't.
speakingPrompt: Describe a teacher who influenced you - their teaching style, lessons, and lasting impact.
fluencyDrill: Write a thank you speech to that teacher and deliver it

warmup.activity: Environment words: pollution, climate, sustainable, recycle, conservation

sentences: Climate change is a serious issue.
We need to reduce our carbon footprint.
speakingPrompt: Discuss an environmental issue you care about - causes, effects, and solutions.
fluencyDrill: Give a persuasive 2-minute speech on why everyone should care about the environment

warmup.activity: Social media words: viral, followers, algorithm, content, influencer

sentences: Social media has pros and cons.
speakingPrompt: Present both sides of the social media debate - benefits and drawbacks.
fluencyDrill: Argue one side for 1 minute, then argue the opposite side

warmup.activity: History words: revolution, era, significant, impact, legacy

sentences: It changed the course of history.
The legacy still affects us today.
speakingPrompt: Describe a historical event - context, key figures, and its lasting impact.
fluencyDrill: Explain the event as if you were a news reporter from that time

warmup.activity: Science words: hypothesis, experiment, evidence, theory, research

speakingPrompt: Explain a scientific concept in simple terms - what it is and why it matters.
fluencyDrill: Explain the concept to a 10-year-old in 90 seconds

warmup.activity: Work words: remote, automation, skills, adapt, flexible

sentences: New skills are needed for the future.
speakingPrompt: Discuss how work might change in the next 20 years and how to prepare.
fluencyDrill: Present your vision of the ideal future workplace

warmup.activity: Art words: abstract, portrait, landscape, sculpture, masterpiece

speakingPrompt: Describe a piece of art you admire - the work, the artist, and what it means to you.
fluencyDrill: Describe an imaginary painting in vivid detail for 2 minutes

warmup.activity: Wellness words: stress, anxiety, mindfulness, therapy, self-care

sentences: Mental health is as important as physical health.
It's okay to ask for help.
speakingPrompt: Discuss the importance of mental health awareness and ways to maintain wellbeing.
fluencyDrill: Give advice to someone feeling stressed

warmup.activity: Global words: international, trade, culture, economy, interconnected

sentences: It has both positive and negative effects.
speakingPrompt: Discuss how globalization has affected your daily life - products, culture, opportunities.
fluencyDrill: Debate whether globalization is good or bad

warmup.activity: Education words: curriculum, degree, assessment, tuition, scholarship

sentences: The education system in my country...
speakingPrompt: Describe your country's education system - structure, strengths, and areas for improvement.
fluencyDrill: Propose one major education reform and justify it

warmup.activity: Ethics words: moral, right, wrong, consequence, principle

sentences: On one hand... on the other hand...
I believe the right choice is...
speakingPrompt: Present an ethical dilemma and explain different perspectives and your opinion.
fluencyDrill: Argue both sides of the dilemma convincingly

warmup.activity: AI words: algorithm, machine learning, automation, data, neural

sentences: There are concerns about job displacement.
AI has potential benefits in healthcare.
speakingPrompt: Discuss AI - current applications, future possibilities, and ethical concerns.
fluencyDrill: Explain how AI works to someone who's never heard of it

warmup.activity: Culture words: tradition, customs, values, norms, diversity

sentences: I was surprised to learn that...
speakingPrompt: Describe cultural differences you've noticed - either from travel or meeting people.
fluencyDrill: Role-play explaining your culture to a foreign visitor

warmup.activity: Process words: step, procedure, workflow, system, output

speakingPrompt: Explain a complex process from your work or study in clear, step-by-step detail.
fluencyDrill: Teach the process as if training a new colleague

warmup.activity: Diversity words: inclusive, equity, representation, belonging, bias

speakingPrompt: Discuss why diversity and inclusion matter in workplaces and society.
fluencyDrill: Give a 2-minute motivational speech about embracing differences

warmup.activity: News words: headline, breaking, report, coverage, journalist

sentences: A recent news story that caught my attention...
speakingPrompt: Summarize a recent news story - facts, your analysis, and broader implications.
fluencyDrill: Present the news as a TV news anchor

warmup.activity: Energy words: solar, wind, hydroelectric, sustainable, grid

sentences: The benefits of clean energy are...
speakingPrompt: Discuss renewable energy - types, benefits, challenges, and future outlook.
fluencyDrill: Convince a skeptic to support renewable energy

warmup.activity: Balance words: boundaries, priorities, burnout, flexible, wellbeing

sentences: I try to set clear boundaries.
Taking time off helps me recharge.
speakingPrompt: Discuss work-life balance - what it means to you and strategies to achieve it.
fluencyDrill: Give advice to a workaholic colleague

warmup.activity: Leadership words: vision, integrity, empathy, decisive, inspire

speakingPrompt: Describe the qualities of an effective leader and give examples of leaders you admire.
fluencyDrill: Deliver a speech as if you're leading a team through a challenge

warmup.activity: Art words: expression, creativity, culture, heritage, contemporary

speakingPrompt: Discuss the role of art in society - its purpose, impact, and importance.
fluencyDrill: Curate a virtual art exhibition and present it

warmup.activity: Reflection words: improvement, progress, milestone, journey, growth

sentences: The next 50 days I will focus on...
speakingPrompt: Reflect on your first 50 days - improvements, challenges, and goals for the next 50.
fluencyDrill: Record a 3-minute reflection speech without any notes
